judge_result.short_rationale: Only the fresh-air step matches. It omits two required immediate actions: call 911/ambulance if not breathing and call poison control or a doctor. It also adds cross-incident skin/eye rinsing and 'do not induce vomiting,' which are unsupported and dangerous for an inhalation scenario.
